title: Random Fantasy Defense
description:
Random Fantasy Defense combines Tower Defense strategy with Roguelike progression. Summon heroes blessed by the gods, adapt to unpredictable blessings from the Goddess of Fortune, and defend Mystologia against an encroaching darkness. Every run offers new challenges, new opportunities, and new ways to achieve victory.

Summary
A mysterious dark energy has invaded the magical world of Mystologia, plunging the realm into a desperate war for survival. The goddesses grant blessings to aid humanity, but the blessing of Goddess of Fortune twists every gift into an unpredictable gamble. Build your strategy, adapt to ever-changing blessings, and lead Mystologia against the encroaching darkness. Will your tactics overcome the chaos of fate?

Features
- Build and manage your army through a unique random summoning system.
- Balance your resources between expanding your forces and creating powerful high-rank units.
- Adapt to unpredictable blessings and make the best of every opportunity.
- Unlock upgrades and shape your strategy differently in every run.
- Master tactical positioning, unit combinations, and resource management to overcome overwhelming odds.
- Luck may influence the battlefield, but only strategy can secure victory.
description_short: A Tower Defense with Roguelike factor where divine blessings are unpredictable. Build your army, adapt to random fortunes, and defend Mystologia from an encroaching darkness.
